title: The Bull Market has yet to show us its legs. Does it matter?
section_path: The Bull Market has yet to show us its legs. Does it matter?
section_path_text: The Bull Market has yet to show us its legs. Does it matter?
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week:
US stocks hit an all-time high with the S&P 500 hitting 5000 points. Yet, the rally still has to demonstrate legs. Leadership is narrow, earnings are barely supportive and the Fed has turned more hawkish.
